calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-02-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry Dorfman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., (510-985-9250) specially appearing for Plaintiff, Cach, LLC.,
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Danilo C. Pablico,
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Amended Declaration of Peter Huber pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $7,901.44
Pre-Judgment Interest and Attorney's Fees are waived in Open Court.
Costs: $431.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $8,332.44
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-07-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-07-2014 Continued To Jun-02-14 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Ruth H. Downes, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff CACH, LLC.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant DANILO C. PABLICO.
Declaration of pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.

Court continued matter to June 2, 2014 at 11:00 am, in Department 514. Counsel to submit Amended Declaration pursuant to CCP 98 in lieu of testimony. Copy of Declaration submitted by counsel is deficient.
Counsel to submit declaration at least 10 days before new hearing date with a courtesy copy delivered directly to Department 514.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2013 Set For Trial On Apr-07-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-25-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances, Atty. Robert Cohen (800-492-2657) special appearance for plaintiff moving party. No other appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC's Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; Request For Monetary Sanctions. DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. Plaintiff's moving papers do not include a proof of service of the notice of motion and motion on defendant Danilo Pablico. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem Ernst Halperin, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)
